name: Lamb Rogan Josh
tagline: Kashmiri lamb curry — yogurt-tenderized, kashmiri-chili red, fennel-perfumed
highlight: Yogurt + kashmiri chili — no soy, no tomato, all depth

hero.alt: Lamb rogan josh in red gravy with cilantro
hero.caption: rogan josh — kashmiri red

healthFacts: Kashmiri chili gives deep red color with little heat — capsaicin-light.
Yogurt marinade tenderizes lamb's tougher cuts via lactic acid.

steps.title: Marinate lamb
steps.detail: Whisk yogurt with kashmiri chili, fennel, ginger powder, salt. Coat lamb. Rest 30 min.
steps.tip: Overnight marinade is even better — the yogurt melts into the meat.

steps.title: Bloom whole spices
steps.detail: Heat ghee in a heavy pot. Add cardamom, cloves, cinnamon, sizzle 30 sec. Add onion; cook 12 min until deep gold.
steps.tip: Whole-spice tadka first — releases maximum aromatic oils.

media.alt: Whole spices in ghee with onion
media.caption: bloom whole spices

steps.title: Garlic-ginger and yogurt
steps.detail: Add ginger-garlic paste 1 min. Add lamb with marinade; cook on high 8 min, stirring, until yogurt water evaporates and lamb starts to brown.
steps.tip: Don't add tomato — real Kashmiri rogan josh skips it. Color comes from kashmiri chili and slow cooking.

steps.title: Slow simmer
steps.detail: Add 2 cups water. Cover, simmer low 60 min until lamb is fork-tender and gravy clings. Garam masala at the end.
steps.tip: The longer the simmer, the silkier the gravy. Don't rush.
